gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 re-reviewed tiered-cache observability and schema v2 handoff changes; final result was Clean.
verification: poetry run pytest -q tests/test_databricks_job.py tests/test_template_resources.py tests/test_engine_adapters.py
GPT-5.5 review clean after resolving materializer, handoff serialization, local_disk coverage, and schema-version findings
what_changed: Added measured per-segment cache-tier attribution across materialization, engine-ready requests, and schema-v2 engine handoff records.
Propagated cache_tier into engine injection plans and copy actions, plus docs/templates for the new handoff schema.
why: Serving benchmarks and adapters need to attribute materialization latency to cpu, local_disk, or cold_storage for every KV segment without losing that data at the engine boundary.
